headline: 9 Stocks Are Down But Not Out — Analysts Predict Big Comebacks

headline: Copart's Incoming CEO Jay Adair Signals Growth Push, M&A and AI Focus
summary: Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) Executive Chairman and incoming Chief Executive Officer Jay Adair told investors the company is preparing to accelerate growth initiatives as he returns to the CEO role, emphasizing that the leadership change is not temporary and that the salvage vehicle auction company remains
